GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Bun test suites for CLI modules; pure-function tests for status-runtime and lint helpers.
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: `bun test` across all test files; `bun run ./scripts/validate-marketplace.ts`.
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: `bun run grace lint --path . --allow-missing-docs` plus smoke run of `bun run ./src/grace.ts status --brief --path .`.
GlobalPolicy.redaction: No secrets are handled by any module; nothing to redact.

scenarios.scenario-1: `grace lint` produces zero errors on a clean GRACE project.
scenarios.scenario-2: Missing verification entry referenced by graph is reported as error.

scenarios.scenario-1: Root --help lists all four subcommands (lint, module, file, status).
--brief on a fully-initialized project prints <=30 lines with module count, verification coverage, next action.
scenarios.scenario-2: Project missing required docs yields "Initialized: NO" and a next-action pointing to `grace-init`.

scenarios.scenario-1: `collectBrief` on initialized project returns correct moduleCount, verificationCount, coveredModules.
scenarios.scenario-2: Missing required docs -> initialized=false, missingRequired populated, next action references `grace-init`.
scenarios.scenario-3: CLAUDE.md missing promotes "CLAUDE.md missing" into nextAction.

scenarios.scenario-1: Complete skill emits no issues.
scenarios.scenario-2: Skill with no sections yields three warnings (rationalizations, when-not, verification).
scenarios.scenario-3: Partial skill yields only warnings for the missing sections.
scenarios.scenario-4: Scans plugins/ mirror in addition to skills/.
scenarios.scenario-5: Project without skills/ directory returns no issues (no crash).

scenarios.scenario-1: Unique-tag XML passes.
scenarios.scenario-2: Generic Module tag with ID attribute flagged.
scenarios.scenario-3: Graph references V-M-xxx not in verification-plan -> error.

scenarios.scenario-1: TypeScript adapter resolves exports via AST.
scenarios.scenario-2: Python adapter detects exports via regex.

scenarios.scenario-1: Valid .grace-lint.json parses.
scenarios.scenario-2: Unknown keys produce schema-level error.

scenarios.scenario-1: `find` resolves modules by name, path, dependency, verification ref.
scenarios.scenario-2: `show` returns a module record with verification excerpt when requested.

scenarios.scenario-1: `file show` returns MODULE_CONTRACT, MODULE_MAP, blocks.
loadGraceArtifactIndex returns correct modules and verifications.
scenarios.scenario-2: findModules with type filter narrows results.

scenarios.scenario-1: formatModuleText produces readable output.
Every SKILL.md contains three required sections (Common Rationalizations, When NOT to Use, Verification).
scenarios.scenario-2: Every SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter.

scenarios.scenario-1: plugins/grace/skills/grace/* matches skills/grace/* byte-for-byte.
marketplace.json version matches README, package.json, openpackage.yml, plugin.json.
scenarios.scenario-2: Each declared skill path exists in plugins/grace/skills/grace/.
scenarios.scenario-3: grace-bootstrap is declared in the shipped skill list.

scenarios.scenario-1: Reports PASS for a clean repo.
scenarios.scenario-2: Reports FAIL when canonical and packaged drift apart.

scenarios.scenario-1: `grace afk start 1` writes state.json under docs/afk-sessions//.
scenarios.scenario-2: `grace afk tick` returns remaining time while session is fresh.
scenarios.scenario-3: `grace afk tick` exits 42 (BUDGET_EXHAUSTED) once expiresAt passes.
scenarios.scenario-4: `grace afk tick` exits 43 (NO_SESSION) when no session exists.
scenarios.scenario-5: `grace afk tick` exits 44 (SESSION_STOPPED) after `grace afk stop`.
scenarios.scenario-6: `grace afk journal` and `grace afk defer` append to the session markdown files.
scenarios.scenario-7: `grace afk report` prints summary and marks session completed.

required-log-markers.marker-1: None; CLI writes structured JSON / plain text for the agent to parse.

scenarios.scenario-1: createSession writes docs/afk-sessions//state.json with correct expiresAt.
scenarios.scenario-2: Invalid hours or checkpoint values throw.
scenarios.scenario-3: checkActive returns `ok=true` while fresh and `expired` after expiresAt.
scenarios.scenario-4: markStopped sets status=stopped; findActiveSession returns null.

scenarios.scenario-1: appendDecision writes header and entry fields (class, title, context, rationale, outcome).
scenarios.scenario-2: appendDeferred adds a single-line entry with timestamp and optional suggestion.

scenarios.scenario-1: loadAfkConfig returns null + descriptive error when no candidate exists at env, project, or global.
scenarios.scenario-2: loadAfkConfig returns null + error on invalid JSON at the resolved path.
scenarios.scenario-3: loadAfkConfig parses a valid project-local file and reports source=project.
scenarios.scenario-4: loadAfkConfig falls back to ~/.grace/afk.json when no project-local override exists and reports source=global.
scenarios.scenario-5: resolveAfkConfigPath picks $GRACE_AFK_CONFIG when it exists, overriding both project and global.
scenarios.scenario-6: resolveAfkConfigPath ignores $GRACE_AFK_CONFIG when the referenced file is missing and falls through to next candidate.
scenarios.scenario-7: resolveAfkConfigPath prefers project-local over global when both exist.
scenarios.scenario-8: getTelegram returns null if config lacks either botToken or chatId; returns credentials when both present.
scenarios.scenario-9: getMaxEscalations defaults to 3, honors configured value, falls back on negative/non-finite.

test-files.file: covered indirectly by src/evolve-*.test.ts + manual smoke

module-checks.check-2: bun test src/evolve-spec.test.ts src/evolve-metric.test.ts src/evolve-score.test.ts src/evolve-archive.test.ts src/evolve-runner.test.ts

scenarios.scenario-1: `grace evolve --help` lists init / run / show subcommands.
scenarios.scenario-2: `grace evolve init <topic>` writes a starter spec.json and refuses to overwrite.
scenarios.scenario-3: `grace evolve run` exits 47 with per-error stderr when the spec fails validation.
scenarios.scenario-4: `grace evolve run` produces docs/experiments/<topic>/results.xml after a successful loop.

scenarios.scenario-1: Type surface compiles under strict mode.
validateSpec rejects non-object input.
scenarios.scenario-2: validateSpec collects multiple errors for a spec missing version / topic / goal / metrics / candidates.
scenarios.scenario-4: validateSpec rejects candidates with >1 or 0 sources.
scenarios.scenario-5: validateSpec accepts a valid minimal spec.
scenarios.scenario-6: loadSpec reports spec.missing for a non-existent file.
scenarios.scenario-7: loadSpec reports spec.parse-error for broken JSON.
scenarios.scenario-8: loadSpec returns ok for a valid JSON file on disk.

scenarios.scenario-1: Default parser picks the last numeric-only line.
scenarios.scenario-2: Default parser returns null + error when no numeric line is present.
scenarios.scenario-3: Custom parser regex extracts the capture group.
scenarios.scenario-4: Custom parser returns null + error when regex does not match.
scenarios.scenario-5: Invalid parser regex returns a descriptive error.

scenarios.scenario-1: normalizeMetric maps higher-is-better values correctly.
scenarios.scenario-2: normalizeMetric inverts for lower-is-better.
scenarios.scenario-3: normalizeMetric returns 1 when cohort min equals max.
scenarios.scenario-4: hasVeto returns false when no veto is set.
scenarios.scenario-5: hasVeto catches a value below a higher-is-better veto.
scenarios.scenario-6: scoreTrials returns a per-candidate weighted score.
scenarios.scenario-7: scoreTrials returns null for trials with any null metric value.

scenarios.scenario-1: runCandidate returns verdict=advance when all metric commands succeed and parse.
scenarios.scenario-2: runCandidate returns verdict=failed when any metric command exits non-zero.
scenarios.scenario-3: runCandidate returns verdict=failed with "setup failed" reason when setup exits non-zero.
scenarios.scenario-4: runCandidate returns verdict=failed when worktree path does not exist.
scenarios.scenario-5: runCandidate runs teardown after metrics in order (journal-based check).

test-files.file: manual / smoke only — requires a real git repo. Integration covered by the orchestrator smoke scenario.

scenarios.scenario-1: prepareWorktree creates an isolated tree for a baseline candidate at HEAD.
scenarios.scenario-2: prepareWorktree creates a temp branch and applies a patch for patch candidates.
scenarios.scenario-3: cleanupWorktree removes the worktree and the temp branch.

scenarios.scenario-1: archivePath sanitizes unsafe characters in topic.
scenarios.scenario-2: renderArchive emits envelope, goal, metrics, trials.
scenarios.scenario-3: renderArchive omits optional top-level Winner / StoppedBy / FinishedAt when absent.
scenarios.scenario-4: renderArchive XML-escapes special characters in topic, goal, reason.
scenarios.scenario-5: writeArchive creates the target directory and atomically writes the file.

test-files.file: manual / smoke only — exercised end-to-end by `grace evolve run <topic>` on a real repo.

scenarios.scenario-1: runEvolve walks all candidates when none of the stopping criteria trigger.
scenarios.scenario-2: runEvolve stops by maxCandidates.
scenarios.scenario-6: winner is the trial with the highest non-null score; null when every trial failed/vetoed.

scenarios.scenario-1: readUsage returns null when the cache file is missing.
scenarios.scenario-2: readUsage returns null when the cache JSON is malformed.
scenarios.scenario-3: readUsage parses five_hour / seven_day / extra_usage into UsageSnapshot.
scenarios.scenario-4: readUsage maps used_credits (cents) to dollars with two-decimal precision.
scenarios.scenario-5: renderUsageLine formats "5h N% · 7d N% · $used/limit · cache age Xs".
scenarios.scenario-6: renderUsageLine falls back to a readable message when snapshot is null.

scenarios.scenario-1: sendMessage posts to /sendMessage and returns messageId.
scenarios.scenario-2: sendMessage returns ok=false with error description from API.
scenarios.scenario-4: matchReply matches by reply_to_message_id or correlation id prefix.
scenarios.scenario-5: classifyAnswer recognizes A-E, PROCEED, STOP, EVOLVE, DEFER in any token position.
scenarios.scenario-6: classifyAnswer returns UNKNOWN with recognized=false for free-form text.

Gate-Phase-4.goal: CLI support fully tested and integrated.

required-evidence.evidence-1: All status-runtime and lint-skill-sections tests pass.

required-evidence.evidence-2: Status reports Initialized: YES with non-zero moduleCount.
